description: Import the Tier II chemical inventory data for the Green Valley Water Facility in Colchester, Vermont, from the XML file located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\epcra_tier2_data.xml into CAMEO Data Manager. This file contains hazardous chemical inventory information, including Chlorine and Fluorosilic Acid storage. Verify that the facility 'Green Valley Water Facility' appears in the Facilities list after the import is complete.
